name: 0n1x
description: Neutral cryptographic trust layer for AI agents. Ask a question, get a reality-verified, signed answer you can check without trusting us.

skills.name: Verifiable Query
skills.description: Ask any reality-resolvable question (merchant/domain safety, crypto price, TVL, FX, GitHub); get a signed verified answer. Refuses to sign unverifiable opinion.

skills.name: Counterparty Check
skills.description: Verify a merchant/counterparty before an agent pays it — signed risk verdict.
